title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION THRIFT STORE MADRAS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-cost clothing, furniture, household items, appliances, books, and videos. Accepts donations including large furniture. 1412 SW Highway 97 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Stores: Monday 9am-3pm and Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 475-6961 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-6961 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Store: Walk in Donation: Drop off or call to schedule pick-up within city limits. Visit website to see list of accepted items. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Clothing Donation Programs Donation Pickups Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
